endpoints_reviewed.notes: Detail endpoint now exposes top-level trace_metadata derived from persisted JSON payloads.
Reviewed for ContactPanel impact; tenant_domain_contract top-level remains a follow-up.

api_shape.before: trace_metadata was only nested inside composer_output/state_after/raw payloads if present.
api_shape.after: TurnTraceDetail includes top-level trace_metadata, with trace_metadata.universal_turn_trace when persisted.
api_shape.missing_trace_behavior: trace_metadata is null; frontend shows metadata_missing/raw trace fallback.

tests.command: uv run ruff check atendia/api/turn_traces_routes.py tests/api/test_turn_trace_metadata_serializer.py tests/api/test_turn_traces_routes.py

tests.result: Test Files 2 passed (2); Tests 11 passed (11); Duration 3.23s

tests.command: npm exec -- biome check <5 touched frontend files>
tests.result: Checked 5 files in 27ms. No fixes applied.

environment_notes: The first API test run failed because default database_url pointed at localhost:5432 and no service was listening there.
Docker showed atendia_postgres_v2 healthy on localhost:5433, so integrated API tests were re-run with ATENDIA_V2_DATABASE_URL pointed at port 5433 and passed.
risks_remaining: Default local database_url and running Docker Postgres port are misaligned.
ConversationDetail still does not expose tenant_domain_contract top-level; recommended follow-up for ContactPanel metadata completeness.
Legacy traces without trace_metadata safely return null.
next_step: Align dev/test DB URL and review ConversationDetail tenant_domain_contract exposure as a separate follow-up.
